creator: greenreaper@hotmail.com
text:
If you configure DOCS but not GS_pcl3 [D: HP PCL 3+ (generic)] the compilation fails at the post-install-docs step as described here:
https://groups.google.com/forum/#!searchin/mailing.freebsd.ports/print$2Fghostscript9-agpl-base/mailing.freebsd.ports/Rh39Lx9zBmY/iUwZUoa6DwAJ

I noticed this when ImageMagick-nox11 compilation failed; it probably became an issue when Bug 208159 landed.

If drivers can be disabled, they shouldn't randomly stop documentation from working.
